---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement for PCILeechFWGenerator
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

<!--
Before filing:
- Search existing issues to avoid duplicates.
- For open-ended ideas or "would it be possible to..." questions, please ask
  in the support Discord (https://discord.gg/dwQfMNsb7W) — issues are for
  concrete proposals we can act on.
-->

## Problem / motivation

<!--
What are you trying to do that's currently hard, impossible, or awkward?
Describe the use case, not the solution. e.g. "I'm trying to generate firmware
for board X but the donor profile flow assumes Y."
-->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would you like to see? CLI flag, new module, config option, etc. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Workarounds you've tried, or other approaches you thought about. -->

## Scope

- [ ] Affects firmware generation / RTL output
- [ ] Affects the TUI
- [ ] Affects the build pipeline (Vivado / container / release)
- [ ] Affects donor / device profiling
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Are you willing to contribute?

- [ ] I can submit a PR
- [ ] I can help test
- [ ] I'm just filing the idea

## Additional context

<!-- Hardware involved, links to specs, related projects, screenshots, etc. -->
